articles.title: Development and cross-site validation of machine-learning models for diagnosis and prognosis of stable angina with and without obstructive coronary artery disease: a study protocol.
articles.authors: Deng J, Patel SK, Fung M, Heybati K, Layard B et al.
articles.key_finding: This protocol describes shared methods for two machine-learning (ML) studies: (1) differentiating ANOCA from stable angina with obstructive CAD and (2) predicting long-term mortality among patients with ANOCA and obstructive CAD.

articles.title: Early safety and efficacy of intra-annular versus supra-annular self-expanding transcatheter heart valves.
articles.journal: Clinical research in cardiology : official journal of the German Cardiac Society
articles.authors: Mattig I, Romero Dorta E, Kösters L, Fietz AK, Schulze D et al.
articles.key_finding: The FIRE TAVI study compared procedural in-hospital and mid-term outcomes of the intra-annular Navitor THV and the supra-annular Evolut PRO THV.

articles.title: Safety and Feasibility of Left Bundle Branch Area Pacing Following Transcatheter Tricuspid Valve Replacement.
articles.authors: Kamareddine M, Olleik F, Hanley C, Goldman S, Gray WA et al.
articles.key_finding: Our series reinforces its safety and adds systematic echocardiographic follow-up.

articles.title: BMPR2 affects valve development via ECM-receptor interaction in zebrafish.
articles.journal: Frontiers in cell and developmental biology
articles.authors: Shi Y, Huang Y, Xia Y, Li Y, Wang Y et al.
articles.key_finding: In this study, we demonstrate that bmpr2a and bmpr2b cooperatively regulate cardiac contractile function and valve development in zebrafish, providing insights into BMPR2-mediated cardiovascular morphogenesis in humans.

articles.title: Annular rupture in TAVI: considerations on the importance of on-site cardiothoracic surgery.
articles.authors: Bains C, Zamvar V, Bing R

articles.title: Lifetime Valve Management and the Economic Forces Behind TAVR Expansion in Younger Patients
Anomalous Left Circumflex Artery in Valve Interventions: Surgical and Transcatheter Challenges
articles.authors: Koji Furukawa, Hirohito Ishii, Shuhei Sakaguchi, Kousuke Mori, Ayaka Iwasaki, Risa Meiri
articles.key_finding: As transcatheter aortic valve replacement (TAVR) expands to lower-risk populations, understanding mechanisms of injury in both surgical and transcatheter settings is crucial.
